Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.VarResolverSession

Packages that use VarResolverSession
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau
Shared, marshall-free test-support utilities used across the Juneau test modules.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
Simple Variable Language
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.vars
Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.config.vars
Configuration Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger
REST Swagger Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.vars
Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.widget
HTML Widget API

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    XVar.resolve(VarResolverSession session, String arg)
     
    void
    XVar.resolveTo(VarResolverSession session, Writer w, String arg)
     

  • Uses of VarResolverSession in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl that return VarResolverSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> VarResolverSession
    VarResolverSession.bean(Class<T> c, T value)
    Adds a bean to this session.
    VarResolverSession
    VarResolver.createSession()
    Creates a new resolver session with no session objects.
    VarResolverSession
    VarResolver.createSession(WritableBeanStore beanStore)
    Same as VarResolver.createSession() except allows you to specify a bean store for resolving beans.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl with parameters of type VarResolverSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Supplier<String>
    VarTemplate.asSupplier(VarResolverSession session)
    Returns a Supplier that resolves this template against the given session each time its Supplier.get() method is called.
    protected boolean
    Var.canResolve(VarResolverSession session)
    Returns true if this variable can be resolved in the specified session.
    String
    DefaultingVar.doResolve(VarResolverSession session, String s)
     
    String
    MultipartResolvingVar.doResolve(VarResolverSession session, String s)
     
    protected String
    Var.doResolve(VarResolverSession session, String arg)
    The method called from VarResolver.
    final String
    TypedFunction.invoke(VarResolverSession session, List<Object> args)
     
    String
    VarFunction.invoke(VarResolverSession session, List<Object> args)
    Invokes this function with already-resolved, type-coerced arguments.
    String
    MapVar.resolve(VarResolverSession session, String varVal)
     
    String
    MultipartVar.resolve(VarResolverSession session, String s)
     
    abstract String
    MultipartVar.resolve(VarResolverSession session, String[] args)
    The interface that needs to be implemented for this interface.
    String
    StreamedVar.resolve(VarResolverSession session, String arg)
     
    abstract String
    Var.resolve(VarResolverSession session, String arg)
    The interface that needs to be implemented for subclasses of SimpleVar.
    String
    VarTemplate.resolve(VarResolverSession session)
    Resolves this template against the given session.
    void
    SimpleVar.resolveTo(VarResolverSession session, Writer w, String arg)
     
    abstract void
    Var.resolveTo(VarResolverSession session, Writer w, String arg)
    The interface that needs to be implemented for subclasses of StreamedVar.
    Writer
    VarTemplate.resolveTo(VarResolverSession session, Writer out)
    Resolves this template against the given session and writes the result directly to out.
    Writer
    VarTemplate.resolveToUnchecked(VarResolverSession session, Writer out)
    Convenience helper for callers that need to VarTemplate.resolveTo(VarResolverSession, Writer) but don't want to handle IOException.
